name: Noisettes of Lamb on Artichokes Served with Tarragon Jus
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the lamb fillets and cut into noisettes, approximately 60 grams each.
2. Trim and cook the artichoke hearts until refreshed and refrigerated.
3. Clean and prepare the vegetables into julienne strips.
4. Sweat the vegetables in butter over low heat until al dente.
5. Add tarragon to the lamb jus and reduce by half.
6. Correct seasoning of the lamb jus.
7. Cook the noisettes in butter and oil until pink.
8. Place the noisettes on top of the artichoke hearts.
9. Put the noisettes on a plate that has been coated with the tarragon-infused lamb jus.
10. Garnish with the julienne strips of vegetables and serve.
